code:
gantt
    title Product Launch Timeline
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    todayMarker off

    section Research
    Market Analysis      :done, research1, 2024-01-01, 14d
    User Interviews      :done, research2, 2024-01-08, 21d
    Competitor Review    :done, research3, after research1, 10d

    section Design
    Wireframes           :done, design1, after research2, 14d
    Visual Design        :done, design2, after design1, 21d
    Prototype            :active, design3, after design2, 14d
    User Testing         :design4, after design3, 10d

    section Development
    Backend API          :dev1, after design1, 42d
    Frontend MVP         :dev2, after design2, 35d
    Integration          :dev3, after dev1, 14d
    Performance Tuning   :dev4, after dev3, 7d

    section Testing
    Unit Tests           :test1, after dev2, 14d
    Integration Tests    :test2, after dev3, 10d
    UAT                  :test3, after test2, 14d
    Bug Fixes            :done, crit, test4, after test3, 7d

    section Launch
    Beta Release         :milestone, launch1, after test3, 1d
    Marketing Prep       :launch2, after design4, 21d
    Public Launch        :crit, launch3, after test4, 1d
    Post-Launch Support  :launch4, after launch3, 30d

    section Markers
    Q2 Start             :vert, q2start, 2024-04-01, 1d
repo_description: A full Rust implementation of a mermaid diagram parser & renderer

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为新产品上线做一个完整的甘特图，时间跨度大概到Q2。整体分成五个阶段：Research、Design、Development、Testing和Launch。你先帮我搭个框架，从2024年1月1号开始。
好的，框架已经建好了。Research部分我放了Market Analysis、User Interviews和Competitor Review，前两个已经标记为done。Design这边Wireframes和Visual Design也完成了，Prototype正在进行中。
User Interviews要依赖Market Analysis的结果，所以应该放在1月8号开始，持续三周。Competitor Review可以等Market Analysis做完再启动，不用和User Interviews并行。还有，Wireframes必须等User Interviews结束才能开始。
依赖关系都调整好了。Development部分我加了Backend API和Frontend MVP，Integration和Performance Tuning放在后面。Testing这块有Unit Tests、Integration Tests、UAT，还有Bug Fixes——这个我标了crit，因为是关键路径。
Launch部分需要更细致一些。Beta Release要作为milestone，放在UAT之后。Public Launch也是milestone，但要等Bug Fixes完成，这个也标crit。Marketing Prep可以和User Testing并行启动，Post-Launch Support要持续一个月。
确认一下：Beta Release是milestone，在test3也就是UAT之后；Public Launch是crit milestone，在test4 Bug Fixes之后；Marketing Prep从design4 User Testing之后开始；Post-Launch Support从launch3 Public Launch之后持续30天。对吗？
对，但Bug Fixes的状态要改成done，因为我们已经提前处理了一批。另外加个Markers区域，放Q2 Start作为垂直参考线，定在4月1号。todayMarker关掉，避免干扰。
稍等，我检查一下——Bug Fixes的done状态已经加上，Q2 Start作为vert标记放在2024-04-01。不过我发现之前Bug Fixes没标crit，现在补上了。整个时间线从1月1号贯穿到5月初，Post-Launch Support覆盖到6月份，符合预期吗？
没问题，这样很清晰。Prototype目前active状态正确，User Testing还没开始。整个依赖链条：Research → Design → Development → Testing → Launch，关键路径上的节点都标了crit。可以定稿了。
